name: Zippy Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of mushroom soup, condensed
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Cook and stir meat until brown; drain off excess fat. Cook macaroni according to package instructions; drain. In an ungreased 2-quart casserole, mix all ingredients except potato chips. Cover and bake for 40 minutes. Uncover and sprinkle with crushed potato chips. Bake for an additional 5 minutes. Serves 4-6.
